title: Add storage layout comments to SimpleBondV4
description: Update contracts/SimpleBondV4.sol to document the current top-level storage anchors around nextBondId, bonds, challenges, judges, and judgeMinFees without changing names, types, ordering, or behavior.

title: Verify the change stays comment-only
description: Review the resulting diff and, if toolchain dependencies are available, compile the contracts to confirm the storage-layout documentation introduces no logic, ABI, or storage-order changes.
